state.next-action: PHASE 22 ACTIVE: portfolio experiment documentation. Phase 21 prerequisite cleanup is now COMPLETE — 21-22 (v4 requirements), 21-25 (create-skill skill), 21-26 (minimal bare/emergent AGENTS.md), 21-27 (find-sprites skill) are all done and committed. Both bare and emergent template AGENTS.md rewritten to stop mandating ARCHITECTURE.md; gates updated to v4 (G1-G4); skills/create-skill.md and skills/find-sprites.md copied into both eval templates as inheritable bootstrap skills. Round 4 is now unblocked at the requirements layer; only thing still blocking round 4 is phase 22 portfolio docs. NEXT SESSION ACTION: start task 22-01. Strategy: build a new `gad eval sink` subcommand that reads from evals//gad.json + v/TRACE.json + run/ + FINDINGS-*.md + EXPERIMENT-LOG.md + REQUIREMENTS-VERSIONS.md and compiles MDX into apps/portfolio/content/docs/get-anything-done/evals/. Reuse docs-compiler.cjs patterns from lib/. Target structure: evals/index.mdx (hub), evals//index.mdx (per-project), evals//v.mdx (per-run), evals/rounds/round-.mdx (round summaries), evals/findings/*.mdx, evals/requirements-versions.mdx, evals/decisions.mdx. Each per-run page links to apps/portfolio/public/evals/// (playable build) and github URLs for source. Simple MDX first (no custom React components) so we unblock round 4 fast. PHASE-22-PLAN.md in .planning/ has the full execution plan.
